'''Roland Warren''' was an agent of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. Warren was the son of [[Morellian]] scoutmaster [[Barosa Warren]] and an unidentified mother. He was on bad terms with his father, especially since Roland joined the Rebel Alliance, opposing Barosa's wishes.<ref name="AIR" />

Roland Warren's siblings were [[Tole Warren]], [[Alton Lochner]], and [[Danlea Lochner]] (Alton and Danlea changed their names). All of them were half-Morellian and probably came from different mothers, and all of them joined the Rebel Alliance. As of [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], Roland Warren was an undercover contact for the Rebel Alliance in the [[Simik system/Legends|Simik system]].<ref name="AIR" />
